desk.rationale: Signal+Research both against; chasing 5-day extension with no news anchor.
desk.plan: Skip it. Two advisors flag this as chasing — stock is up 5.22% in five days on pure momentum with no catalyst. Risk is clean but when signal and research both say no, this isn't the spot to get aggressive.

signal.note: 1D spike 3.22% extends 5D run to 5.22%. Spark shows spike to 118.06 after dip. RSI 58.6 neutral. Extension risk; chasing momentum.

research.note: Pure technicals; 2.9x volume confirms momentum but zero news catalyst. Noise-driven.

risk.concern: Clean momentum setup in risk-on regime. RSI 58.6 neutral, 5d +5.22% shows strength. SPY above 50d supports.

desk.rationale: Signal+Research both against; +8.39% 5d move already priced in, no fundamental anchor.
desk.plan: Pass. MDT has already made its move — up nearly 5% today and 8.4% on the week with zero news behind it. Chasing here means buying someone else's exit. Wait for a pullback to the 73.72 support zone before revisiting.

signal.note: Strong 1D (4.95%) + 5D (8.39%) already pricing in run. Spark climbs 118% over window. RSI 59.8. Entry too late into established move.

research.note: Strongest technicals but zero news. +5% intraday lacks fundamental anchor. Priced-in momentum.

risk.concern: Strong 5d performance +8.39%, risk-on regime aligned. RSI 59.8 healthy midrange. SPY setup supports longs.

desk.rationale: Signal neutral, Research against, Risk flags medium severity on RSI + mean-reversion risk.
desk.plan: No trade. RSI at 62 and a single-day pop of 4.6% that wasn't matched by the prior week's trend is a red flag. Risk flagged medium concern on mean reversion — that's enough to sit this one out in a crowded financial-sector tape.

signal.note: 4.63% 1D gain but 5D momentum slowed to 3.84%. RSI 62.1 slightly elevated. Spark volatile, indecisive pattern. Mixed signals.

research.note: Financial sector strength but no catalyst. RSI 62 stretched; likely mean-reversion risk.

risk.concern: RSI 62.1 approaching overbought threshold; 5d only +3.84% vs 1d +4.63%. Early caution on mean reversion risk.

desk.rationale: Signal agrees; Research against but low conviction; Risk clean low severity. Split keeps size small.
desk.plan: Buy near 49.17 with a stop at 46.51 (below the 46.88 support pivot) and a first target at 54.49 — that's a 2:1 R:R. The thesis is a fresh MACD bullish cross with RSI at 55.4, meaning there's still room to run without being overbought. The one thing that kills this: the whole financial-sector rally fades and TFC gives back the 46.88 level.

signal.note: Bullish MACD cross fresh signal. Modest 1D/5D (3.66%/2.9%) avoids overextension. RSI 55.4 has room. Clean setup.

research.note: Financials sector sympathy play; MACD bullish cross is technical setup only. No durable catalyst.

risk.concern: Weakest 5d momentum +2.9%, but RSI 55.4 neutral and regime supports. Entry borderline but not disqualifying.

desk.rationale: Signal agrees, Research against, Risk low — early-stage MACD trigger justifies small probe.
desk.plan: Enter around 22.28 with a tight stop at 21.32 (just below the 21.49 support) and target 24.19 for a 2:1 R:R. This is an early-stage MACD cross on healthy RSI (55) — low volume is the concern, so keep size small and treat it as a probe. If volume doesn't show up to confirm in the next session or two, be ready to cut it.

signal.note: Bullish MACD cross. Muted 5D (2.53%) suggests early-stage move. RSI 55.0 clean. Low rel_volume (1.64) but fresh technical trigger.

research.note: Midsmall tier, no news. 1.6x volume insufficient for sustainable move without catalyst.

risk.concern: Lowest 5d momentum +2.53% among cohort, RSI 55 healthy. Late-mover in risk-on tape but regime intact.

desk.rationale: Signal neutral, Research against, Risk clean; sector rotation play with solid entry, small size warranted.
desk.plan: Buy near 310.89 with a stop at 294.35 and a target at 343.97 — 2:1 R:R. JPM is the cleanest name in the financial-sector rotation trade: RSI 58.4, balanced 1d/5d momentum, and regime support from SPY. The knock is low relative volume (1.52x) and no fresh catalyst, so size is small. Wrong if the sector rotation stalls and JPM fails to hold the 296.68 pivot.

signal.note: Bullish MACD cross but weak rel_volume (1.52), lowest of group. Spark shows ~1.3% net gain. Catalyst present but conviction low.

research.note: Mega-cap financials; MACD cross typical sector rotation. No fresh catalyst identified.

risk.concern: Balanced momentum 1d/5d, RSI 58.4 clean midrange. Risk-on regime aligned, SPY support intact. Solid entry.
